$comment: Copy this file to <project>/.claude/secret-guard.json and edit. The PreToolUse hook (secret-guard.sh) will pick it up on the next tool call. If the file is absent, the hook applies the same defaults shown here. Charter: docs/direction/2026-04-28-secret-file-guardrail-charter.md
$matching_note: Patterns are fnmatch globs (* ? [seq]) matched against the BASENAME (last path segment) of files / Bash command tokens. So write basename-only patterns: 'credentials' (NOT '.aws/credentials'), 'credentials*.json' (NOT '.gcloud/credentials*.json'), '.npmrc' (NOT 'home/.npmrc'). Path prefixes are stripped before matching.

$examples.$comment: Common patterns users may add. All basename-only (see $matching_note above). Remove this $examples block before saving.
